description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mono:latest Docker image and runs a before_script to install Doxygen with `apt-get update && apt-get -y install doxygen`. Define a `pages` job in the deploy stage that only runs on the `master` branch. In this job execute `chmod +x build_docs.sh && ./build_docs.sh` followed by `mv Documentation/html/ public/`. Publish the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure the job respects the `only: - master` trigger.
